description.en: EnumDict is a subclass of dict that is used as the namespace for defining enum classes (see Preparing the class namespace). It is exposed to allow subclasses of EnumType with advanced behavior like having multiple values per member. It should be called with the name of the enum class being created, otherwise private names and internal classes will not be handled correctly. Note that only the MutableMapping interface (__setitem__() and update()) is overridden. It may be possible to bypass the ...
